senses.gloss: A placeholder name for a person, used when a name is not known; a generic name; so-and-so

examples.text: يَـٰوَيۡلَتَىٰ لَيۡتَنِي لَمۡ أَتَّخِذۡ فُلَانًا خَلِيلࣰا
examples.english: Oh, woe to me! I wish I had not taken that one as a friend.

etymology.text: Compare Classical Syriac ܦܠܢ (plān) and Hebrew פְּלוֹנִי (pəlônî).
